description:
## What to build

Replace the starter Tauri screen with the static issue explorer shell shown in `docs/research/design/mockups/issue_explorer_functional_sidebar.png`: left navigation, middle issue list pane, and right empty-detail pane.

This task is layout-only. It should not call Rust, TauRPC, Effect services, raw Tauri `invoke`, or `bw`. Use local placeholder or empty-state data only where needed to make the shell visually complete.

Search, sidebar state filters, workspace switching, issue selection, issue detail behavior, and real issue rows remain visual or empty-state only.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] The starter Tauri screen is replaced by a three-pane issue explorer shell matching the mockup direction.
- [ ] The shell has a left navigation pane, middle issue-list pane, and right empty-detail pane.
- [ ] The right pane remains in the `No issue selected` empty state.
- [ ] Search and sidebar filters are visible but inert or disabled; they do not imply implemented filtering.
- [ ] No backend command, TauRPC client, Effect service, or raw Tauri invoke is introduced in this task.
- [ ] Lucide icons are used for shell iconography if icons are introduced.
- [ ] shadcn is only added through the shadcn CLI if reusable base components are introduced in this slice.
- [ ] Relevant frontend checks pass.

## Out of scope

- Real Beadwork data loading.
- Displaying returned `workspacePath`.
- Rendering real `IssueSummary` rows.
- Issue selection or detail behavior.

## Triage

ready-for-agent
title: Build the static three-pane issue explorer shell
